test-method.name: testProductNameNotEmpty
test-method.description: TC_VAL_001: Product name is non-empty and not a placeholder

test-method.name: testSellingPriceFormat
test-method.description: TC_VAL_002: Selling price has valid currency format

test-method.name: testBasePriceGreaterThanOrEqualToSellingPrice
test-method.description: TC_VAL_003: Base price >= selling price (no negative discount)

exception.message: Base price (65.0) must be >= selling price (5525.0) expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Base price (65.0) must be >= selling price (5525.0) expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.ekart.tests.ProductValidationTest.testBasePriceGreaterThanOrEqualToSellingPrice(ProductValidationTest.java:120) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:104) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:443) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:437) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:397) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.run(SuiteRunner.java:336) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.runSuite(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:52) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.run(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:95) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesSequentially(TestNG.java:1301) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesLocally(TestNG.java:1228) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuites(TestNG.java:1134) at test-method.name: testDiscountBadgeMatchesCalculation
test-method.description: TC_VAL_004: Discount badge percentage matches calculated discount

exception.message: Discount badge (15.0%) does not match calculated (-8400.0%). base=65.0 selling=5525.0 expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Discount badge (15.0%) does not match calculated (-8400.0%). base=65.0 selling=5525.0 expected [true] but found [false] at test-method.name: testBrandNameVisible
test-method.description: TC_VAL_005: Brand name is visible and non-empty on detail page

test-method.name: testProductImageLoads
test-method.description: TC_VAL_007: Main product image loads with valid src

test-method.name: testDetailNameMatchesListingCardName
test-method.description: TC_VAL_008: Product name on detail page matches name on listing card

test-method.name: testDetailPriceMatchesListingCardPrice
test-method.description: TC_VAL_009: Product price on detail page matches price shown on listing card

test-method.name: testClickCardLandsOnProductUrl
test-method.description: TC_NAV_001: Clicking any card navigates to /product/<uuid> URL

test-method.name: testUrlProductIdMatchesClickedCard
test-method.description: TC_NAV_002: URL product-id matches the card that was clicked

test-method.name: testBrowserBackReturnsToListing
test-method.description: TC_NAV_003: Browser Back from detail page returns to listing with cards intact

test-method.name: testDirectUrlLoadsCorrectProduct
test-method.description: TC_NAV_004: Direct URL navigation loads the correct product

test-method.name: testEachCardLoadsUniqueProduct
test-method.description: TC_NAV_005: Navigating card-by-card loads different products each time

test-method.name: testBackToHomeFromDetailPage
test-method.description: TC_NAV_006: 'Back to Home' breadcrumb returns to home page

test-method.name: testInvalidProductUrlShowsNotFound
test-method.description: TC_NAV_007: Invalid product UUID shows not-found state, not crash

test-method.name: testMultipleCardsHaveUniqueProductUrls
test-method.description: TC_NAV_008: Multiple cards each produce a unique /product/<id> URL
